name: Cascadia
description: Cascadia is a serene 2021 tile-laying puzzle — draft a hex of Pacific Northwest terrain (forest, mountain, river, prairie, wetland) paired with one of five animals, then place each in your personal landscape to score by adjacency rules. Bears want pairs, foxes want neighbors, salmon want rivers, hawks want isolation, elk want lines. Spiel des Jahres 2022 winner.
